Positive
+ I love the ceiling fan..help control the temperature
+ Good bed and pillow quality

+ Bfast ok... But the main course very basic..for example the bacon very low quality all fat and hard to consume

reviews.title: Relatively fine if you are looking for accommodation in Hoi An.
reviews.text:
I have been to HA a few times, and mostly I stayed near the old town. My criterion for choosing a place is affordability. However, this time, because I was going with older people mainly for family business and not for much leisure, I needed higher convenience, so I tried booking at The Nam An, as the price was reasonable and the amenities were adequate. 

The standards I needed were cleanliness, freshness, breakfast, and a little view, and The Nam An met all these criteria. However, for me, the price at Nam An is still a bit high. It may be an average price in the HA area, but compared to the type of room and conditions at some other places I have stayed, it feels somewhat expensive to me. 

Breakfast has quite a variety of dishes, but I recommend sticking to Bánh mì - Mỳ Quảng - Cao Lầu, as they are traditional Central Vietnamese dishes and the kitchen prepares them quite well. The phở, however, is made from instant noodles with a little meat added, so I was a bit disappointed when I saw that dish being served. 

Another downside is that the villa has 4 floors and is built like a small villa house, so there is no elevator. If you book, consider this if there are older people or very young children, as climbing to the 4th floor can be a bit inconvenient. 

And for those who want to stay close to the old town for a walk, I suggest reconsidering, as it is 1.5 km away. You can ride a bike slowly there, which is okay, but walking is not feasible. Bicycles here are free, so those who are active can enjoy it. 

Overall, it’s worth trying for an experience.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Nice hotel at HoiAn

reviews.title: Best place on our whole trip!
reviews.positives:
Everything about the Nam An Villa was wonderful! From the cheerful receptionist Anna and her staff who were most helpful, to the lovely rooms that were as beautiful as they were comfortable, the breakfast was custom made for each one. 

The location was perfectly set between the paddy fields and old down with a short ride to the beach. They offered us bicycles for free to rent and ride and when we had a problem they were there to attend to us. They were most accommodating and we had a wonderful time. We even did a workshop that they recommended! I would recommend this place highly and definitely revisit when in Hoi An next!

reviews.title: Lovely stay! Would recommend
reviews.text:
We had a lovely stay! The room was spacious and beautifully presented, with a cute balcony area that had chairs for relaxing, plus more chairs inside the room. The hotel itself was very clean and well maintained, and we really appreciated the elevator, especially since we were on the 4th floor.
The only downside was the pool area – while the pool itself was gorgeous, the water was very cold, and there was only one set of loungers, which were located right outside someone’s room. It felt a bit awkward using them.
Overall, a great stay in a beautiful hotel!

However, the bathroom has a strong odor, and the air conditioning blows directly at the foot of the bed, making it quite cold for exposed feet outside the blanket. The breakfast is excellent value for money, with a choice of a main dish, and drinks, fruits, and bread are self-service. The transportation is not very convenient, as you need to take a taxi to get around. Overall, it is a nice place.

También estuvieron pendientes de cualquier cosa que necesitásemos: cambiar toallas, limpiar, organizarnos transporte etc. Está en una calle tranquila, y como te dejan bicis gratis puedes acercarte al casco antiguo en 8-10 minutos.
reviews.negatives: Realmente nos gustó todo, aunque no te esperes un buffet libre para el desayuno, porque te dan una lista de opciones el día antes que tienes que elegir para desayunar. El buffet hace referencia solo a la fruta, zumos y café. Y si estás acostumbrado al desayuno occidental se te puede quedar algo corto. Este aspecto es mejorable.

There are many hotels in Hoi An, so the evaluations can be harsh, but the dragon fruit that was mostly served for breakfast was really delicious!

Lo mejor es que pudimos hacer el viaje libre de equipaje porque el personal del hotel se encargó de llevarnos las maletas hasta el hotel que teníamos reservado en Hue. MARAVILLOSO.

reviews.negatives: Le seul problème: la qualité des vélos qui sont tous rouillés et pneus dégonflés. Pas de sonnette ni de lumière donc pas super pour la sécurité routière qui n’est pas vraiment une priorité au Vietnam!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Place was clean and nice. No elevator though so be prepared to carry your luggage. I think my room was upgraded as it had a balcony which I did not expect, but was definitely grateful for. Pool looks smaller in person, staff was alright, helpful but could be more cheerful. Best part was free use of bicycles! I was able to visit the beach, countryside, and Ancient Town using the bike :) Thanks for making my stay awesome.

reviews.title: Super clean and nice location

reviews.title: Très bien pour un long séjour

Le personnel est aimable et souriant comme partout où nous sommes passés au Vietnam. Location de vélos gratuit.
reviews.negatives:

L'hôtel est excentré par rapport au centre , il faut 30mn à pied pour y accéder, mieux vaut prendre un taxi .

reviews.negatives:
Dommage qu il n y ait pas de chambre quadruple, la chambre à été vérifie durant notre séjour (decompte du mini bar) mais les poubelles n ont pas été vidées ni les chambres faites. Pas très grave pour un séjour de 3 jours mais à minima vider les poubelles et passer un coup de balai ( petit axe d amélioration )
Un peu loin du centre ville à pied avec des enfants, les grab n ont pas voulu nous ramener à l hôtel. 
Dans les moins, La reservation du petit déjeuner la veille. 

Pour le ccoking class qu on a réservé à l hôtel, pas forcément adapté aux enfants, beaucoup d activités et un cours de cuisine trop rapide à mon goût. Si vous chercher vraiment à cuisiner, prendre le temps de connaître les produits tourner vous vers un autre tour.

The breakfast was not really good but the compensation was that it was free, so I guess it is acceptable.  Overall, it was an enjoyable experience.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: wir wurden dank „lunar new year“ in das Schwester Hotel „Nam An Mama Villa“ umquartiert. Dort angekommen wurden wir in eines von 2 Zimmern im Keller gebracht. Dort fanden wir u.a. Schaben und Abortfliegen. Daraufhin baten wir um ein anderes Zimmer, jedoch war laut Aussage der Rezeptionistin alles besetzt. Als am nächsten Tag die Tolilettenspülung nicht mehr funktionierte baten wir erneut um ein anderes Zimmer. Wir hofften auf eines das nicht im Keller sein würde. Jedoch kam sie mit der Karte für das 2. der beiden Zimmer im Keller. Als wir uns darin umsahen fiel uns auf dass das Waschbecken undicht war und den Boden volltropfte. Bei dem Versuch sie darauf hinzuweisen wurden wir nur belächelt und es wurde gesagt „no worry tomorrow we will sent someone to fix it“ leider wurde nichts repariert…generell waren die Rezepionistinnen mehr genervt als hilfsbereit.

Das Personal war sehr freundlich und hat schon vor der Anreise Kontakt aufgenommen. Abends konnte man sich für das Frühstück entscheiden. Es gab aber auch ein Buffet.

reviews.negatives: Die Nachbarhunde waren zwar ein wenig rauflustig, aber auch irgendwann müde.

reviews.title: Double bed room for 3nights
reviews.text: The Nam An villa was a beautiful place to stay for us (a couple, no children). It is located in a quiet side street and you barely hear anything at night. Occasionally a dog or a rooster but it was really silent. The receptionist and all employees there have been really friendly and helpful. They asked us every day what our itinerary is and if we need assistance with anything. They have an affordable laundry service and their breakfast menu is great. I loved their local dish but it might not be for everyone to eat noodle soup and meat in the morning. Their menu ranges from fruit to pho, and you have a decent buffet on the side. Their bike cycle rental is for free. The room was comfortable. The bathroom also alright, I really like the “view” with the big plants in front of the shower window.  It was great staying there !!

Lovely stay.
The staff were very friendly. The rooms were lovely and modern and clean and the pool area was very nice. 
The worst thing was that when a bus was booked for us we were told the wrong time and that it would be straight to Da Lat but instead we woke up super early the next morning to change buses. 
Just be weary of this if booking further transportation through the hotel. 
Overall I would recommend anybody to stay at this place. for all the other reasons mentioned.

Servizio lavanderia comodo e efficiente, in una mezza giornata ci hanno lavato tutti i vestiti che avevamo dato. La colazione è sia a buffet con frutta, caffè, tè, sia viene chiesto di scegliere un piatto da un vasto menù. Assolutamente soddisfatti del soggiorno!
reviews.negatives: Quando siamo arrivati i dispenser dei saponi erano quasi vuoti e non usciva il sapone. Il lavandino non scaricava l'acqua, ma hanno risolto appena abbiamo riportato il problema.

reviews.title: Hoi An
reviews.text: The accommodation is clean, the room is very cute, the price is affordable, and the breakfast is decent. The staff is very good at service. There are also bicycles available for loan.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Il personale si è dimostrato sin da subito estremamente disponibile per ogni nostra esigenza ed estremamente accogliente. La struttura è di grande impatto visivo, di nuova costruzione ed è dotata di una piscina nella corte interna (dove è possibile farsi il bagno e nuotare) sulla quale si affacciano tutti gli accessi alle camere. L'edificio è posto in un quartiere benestante, sito a circa 1,5 km dalla città vecchia, ma l'hotel fornisce gratuitamente a tutti le biciclette per gli spostamenti autonomi. La camera era molto pulita e disponeva di tutto il necessario per garantire il comfort.

La colazione non è ricca ma danno la possibilità di scegliere cosa ordinare per la mattina dopo. La struttura è molto carina e le foto son veritiere.

reviews.title: 高性价比的住宿体验
reviews.text:
位置：酒店离会安古镇核心区域有一定距离，但提供免费的自行车可以骑行过去大概10min，好处是这一片区域很安静，也很安静，去过后觉得这个闹中取静的位置很好
住宿体验：整个服务很贴心，会提前询问到店时间，也很热心的帮忙安排活动，第一天接待我们的前台大哥长的很像白莲花度假村的那个越南籍面孔，全程微笑服务，让人觉得贴心；早餐也蛮丰富的，可以自选一个主食，其他小食和水果任吃；酒店环境也不错，小院子布置的很好
总体来说很推荐来会安玩时住在这里~

reviews.title: 3 nachten voor bezoek aan oude buurt Hoi An, maar vooral naar My Son e.o.
reviews.positives: Prima ontbijt, met een keuze aan vers bereidde Vietnamese eten die je een dag van tevoren moet bestellen. Mooie ontbijt locatie op overdekt terras. Hotel ligt aan een rustige straat, enigzins van het zeer drukke toeristische centrum maar nog steeds op loopafstand en met (zeer) goede (vegetarische) restaurants in de buurt. Rustige en royale slaapkamer met klein balkon.
reviews.negatives: Fietsen waren goed met uitzondering van de handremmen, die kunnen wel een onderhoudsbeurt gebruiken. Dus goed checken voordat je wegrijdt.

reviews.title: Great location!
reviews.text: Lovely hotel with really nice staff! Several places nearby for coffee and food. We found two hidden gems, An Nhiên garden for coffee, about 4 minutes walk—a lovely little oasis; and Thùy Dương Restaurant Phở - Pizza - Cafe for food—the owner was so kind and the food was amazing. It’s across the street. Our room was comfortable and clean and had a great view. We really enjoyed our stay.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Vriendelijk en behulpzaam personeel.Kamer was netjes.Lekker ontbijt

reviews.title: It's a very beautiful hotel. I stayed one night in two different rooms...
reviews.text: It's a really nice hotel. There are also some Koreans here, and we're comfortably staying for three days in Hoi An. Haha. Although it's a bit far from the Old Town, we frequently rode our free bicycles to An Bang Beach and the Old Town. Riding to An Bang Beach on the road feels really great. We ordered one dish each for meals, and the à la carte dishes are really delicious. The friendly staff and the wonderful city view are memorable, and it's a hotel I want to visit again. Considering the price, it's an excellent value for money. It's also nice to walk to the Old Town in about 20 minutes. Highly recommend! Haha.

reviews.title: Aanbevolen
reviews.positives:
Het personeel is super vriendelijk en willen alles voor je regelen. Hotel is mooi. Fijn dat er gratis fietsen zijn om overal naartoe te gaan. 
Het bed was echt heerlijk! Het ontbijt was erg goed.
reviews.negatives:
De fietsen hebben wel echt onderhoud nodig, sommige fietsen remmen echt slecht. Verder liep het water in de douche niet weg, ondanks 2 putjes in de badkamer. Wij moesten de kraan tijdens het douchen uitzetten omdat anders de hele badkamer onder water liep. 
Wij waren er in het weekend en vertrokken op maandag. Maandag ochtend 7 uur begonnen ze naast het hotel met verbouwen. Hier kan het hotel overigens niks aan verandeen. In het weekend heerlijk geslapen.

Room for improvements: consider adding hooks in the bathroom, to hang clothes or towels. In our room, some sockets are close so maybe consider fixing those or adding new ones. 

Aside from those, our stay was overall good. The breakfast buffet was also so delicious and generous. The pool is also clean.

reviews.title: Best stay in all of Vietnam
reviews.text:
We stayed here for only one night, we wished it was 3. When we arrived we asked about getting a suit made. The front receptionist recommended her family’s shop. We had a suit and dress made in 24 hours. 

The hotel included free breakfast of your choice plus additional fruit, toast, cereal, etc. Bicycles were available for free and you can take them as long as you wish. 

Every picture is exactly as the ones on Agoda. They organize the coconut boat tour instantly and cheaper than you will get it down at the ancient town. 

The bed is so comfy! Pillows are out of this world. The place is spotless. We had to check out at 12, but our bus wasn’t leaving until 9pm. You can relax by the pool all day for no charge. There are towels and showers. We were treated like royalty.

reviews.text: The hotel is small but charming, cool, and full of greenery. The rooms are clean and are cleaned every day. It is fully equipped with amenities and personal hygiene products. The staff is very friendly and eager to help. I wanted to find a place to get my hair washed, and the receptionist pointed it out to me. It is very suitable for families, couples, or business trips.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Второй раз останавливаюсь в этом отеле и во второй раз все в самом лучшем виде. Удобное расположение чуть вдали от старого города (можно спокойно дойти пешком или взять в отеле велосипед), тихо, спокойно, но при этом все в шаговой доступности, прямо напротив открылся отличный ресторан с европейскими и местными блюдами, все вкусно и адекватная цена. В отеле завтрак по меню, можно также выбирать между европейскими и вьетнамскими блюдами. 
Комната просторная и светлая, по утрам солнечно.
Отдельная благодарность девушкам администраторам, которые всегда были на связи и помогали при любом обращении. Красивые, милые и невероятно дружелюбные, благодаря им пребывание в этом месте было еще более комфортным и спокойным.
